notableEvents.label: Jac Caglianone — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 9 · 2–2 · Jac Caglianone singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Lane Thomas scores. Jac Caglianone to 3rd. Jac Caglianone advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Julio Rodríguez.
